title: Suzuka F1: Ferrari’s double-edged weapon explained 🚨 #Ferrari #SF26 #F1 #JapaneseGP #Mercedes #race
description:
Suzuka is always one of the toughest and most technical tracks in Formula 1, but this year it’s also a major test of energy management—and that could shape the entire race weekend.

Coming into Japan, Mercedes looks like the clear favorite. After a strong performance in China, they appear to have the most complete package on the grid. Suzuka suits them perfectly, especially with their top speed and excellent battery management. With the FIA limiting the use of active aerodynamics, energy deploym

title: F1 LIVE: Verstappen's Major Announcement & Hamilton Investigation Result Explained
description: Breaking F1 news: Max Verstappen reveals a major new project ahead of the Japanese Grand Prix in Suzuka, while the FIA delivers a key ruling affecting Lewis Hamilton. We break down what this means for the season, potential impacts on teams, and what to watch for in the race weekend. Includes quick explainer on the Hamilton ruling, implications for standings, and what Verstappen’s announcement signals for the future of his racing empire. title: Verstappen And Red Bull’s Massive Problems Explained | F1 Explainer
description:
What has happened to Red Bull Racing and McLaren? The teams that once dominated Formula 1 now find themselves in deep trouble. In China, everything went wrong: Max Verstappen had issues and retired, Isack Hadjar spun, the RB22 lacks both speed and reliability, and McLaren did not even make it to the start. Meanwhile, Mercedes and Ferrari simply drove away from the field.

title: 2026 F1 Chinese GP race analysis by Peter Windsor
description: New regs or not - McLaren-Mercedes in the race (or not): nothing could detract from the enormity of this day in Shanghai - from the first GP win for Mercedes' Kimi Antonelli. From the pole, he seized the race lead from Ferrari's Sir Lewis Hamilton on lap two - and was thereafter never headed.  Lewis re-applied pressure after the pit stops; and team-mate, George Russell, was up their in P2, pushing hard, as the race unfolded.  Kimi, though, was unperturbed. title: Australian grand prix Review | Day 10 of learning #F1 #drivetosurvive  #f1explained
description:
Ferrari… we have the car, we have the drivers… but strategy?”

What a crazy season opener at the Australian Grand Prix 🏁
George Russell wins the race, leading a Mercedes 1-2 with Kimi Antonelli, while Ferrari finishes P3 and P4 with Leclerc and Hamilton despite strong pace.

Meanwhile Max Verstappen climbed from P20 to P6, one of the drives of the race.

The 2026 F1 season has started with drama already.
